blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,772 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
